200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Each of the unit’s attacks has a 25% chance of crippling the target. The unit’s attack deals damage equal to 100% of the target’s physical armor.

description 4/6

Each of the unit’s attacks has a 25% chance of crippling the target. The unit’s attack deals damage equal to 120% of the target’s physical armor and reduces the target’s max health by 5%. Lasts for 4 sec. Up to 4 effects. After 5 crippling attacks, the next crippling attack will affect all enemies within a small radius around the target.

description 6/6

Each of the unit’s attacks has a 35% chance of crippling the target. The unit’s shot deals damage equal to 150% of the target’s physical and magic armor and reduces the target’s max health by 12%. Lasts for 4 sec. Up to 4 effects. After 3 crippling attacks, the next crippling attack will affect all enemies within a small radius around the target. Once in every 5 sec, a cannon ball falls onto a random enemy, dealing 200000 physical damage. Also, the cannon ball deals extra pure damage equal to 150% of the target’s max armor. Once 3 cannon balls have been launched, the next cannon ball will affect all enemies within a small radius arouind the target. Also, it will stun all enemies for 2 sec and set them on fire. The burning enmeies take 150000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 65% for 3 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The crippling attack deals additional physical damage equal to 100% of the target’s physical and magic armor.

description 4/6

The crippling attack deals additional physical damage equal to 120% of the target’s physical and magic armor. The crippling attack deals an additional 100000 pure damage.

description 6/6

The crippling attack deals additional physical damage equal to 150% of the target’s physical and magic armor. The crippling attack deals an additional 100000 pure damage. If enemies are already burning when they are hit by a cannonball, they take an additional 300000 pure damage. For each unit that takes that damage, Raider restores 25% of their max health.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Raider restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the crippling attack.

description 4/6

Raider restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the crippling attack. The physical armor of the Raiders is increased by 110% of the damage dealt by the crippling attack for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Raider restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the crippling attack. The physical armor of the Raiders is increased by 110% of the damage dealt by the crippling attack for 5 sec. At the start of the battle, Raider gains a shield that absorbs 300000 physical damage. When a cannonball falls on a random enemy, Raider gains a shield that absorbs 200000 physical damage. Up to 3 effects.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The crippling attack makes the target lose balance for 5 sec.

description 4/6

The crippling attack makes the target lose balance for 5 sec. The crippling attack increases Raider and all allies’ damage by 4% for 5 sec. Up to 5 effects.

description 6/6

The crippling attack makes the target lose balance for 5 sec. The crippling attack increases Raider and all allies’ damage by 4% for 5 sec. Up to 5 effects. For each enemy hit by a cannonball, Raider’s damage is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 8 effects.

Materials

Gunpowder of Darkness
